project_type: Visual learning artifacts repo (SVG sketchnotes) - now adding Word/PowerPoint deliverables
build_system: None (static files). Python scripts generate .docx and .pptx files.
test_framework: None - verification is file generation and content validation
test_command: python -c "import docx; import pptx; print('Libraries available')" && ls -la *.docx *.pptx
verification_instructions: 1. Run the generation script. 2. Confirm .docx and .pptx files are created. 3. Verify file sizes are non-trivial (indicating real content).
snapshot_or_generated_files: Cisco_Packet_Tracer_Webinar_Script.docx and Cisco_Packet_Tracer_Presentation.pptx are the final deliverables
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - can install packages freely. Python 3.11 available.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits. Visual artifacts in topic-slug folders. But this task adds document files to root or a dedicated folder.
key_patterns: Repository uses topic-slug folder pattern. New deliverables should go in a 'webinar/' subfolder for organization.
directory_structure: Root has README.md, AGENT.md, SKILLS.md. sketchnote/ has SVG + HTML viewer. New webinar/ folder will hold the generated documents.
